summary: Comprehensive testing of Messaging Automation features (Iteration 202). Backend: 12/13 tests passed (1 skipped - no pending bookings). Frontend: All automation UI components verified - 6 tabs, 4 automation rules displayed, create/edit/delete dialogs, toggle enable/disable, summary cards, 'Nasil Calisir?' section.

minor.issue: Only 4 of 5 default automation rules seeded. Missing 'booking_confirmed' rule (Rezervasyon Onay Emaili). Template exists but rule not created - likely timing issue in seed logic where templates must exist before rules are created.

action_items: Consider re-running seed-demo or manually creating the 'booking_confirmed' automation rule if needed
seed_data_creation: 4 automation rules seeded via /api/messaging-center/seed-demo (booking_confirmed rule missing)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Messaging Automation module functional. Route: /messaging-dashboard -> Otomasyon tab. 4 rules present (pre_arrival, checked_in, 2x checked_out). booking_confirmed rule missing from seed. All CRUD operations work. Booking status changes trigger automation via fire_booking_event().

PASS - Returns 400 for invalid trigger event

automation_tab.edit_delete_buttons: PASS - Edit (pencil) and Delete (trash) buttons on each rule
